agribalyse.name_fr: Biscuit apéritif à base de pomme de terre, type tuile salée
Chips de pommes de terre, standard

ingredients_text: DRIED POTATOES, VEGETABLE OIL (CORN OIL, COTTONSEED OIL, SOYBEAN OIL, SUNFLOWER OIL), DEGERMINATED CORN FLOUR, CORNSTARCH, RICE FLOUR, MALTODEXTRIN, MONO - AND DIGLYCERIDES, 2% SALT, WHEY, DEXTROSE, NATURAL FLAVORS, MONOSODIUM GLUTAMATE, TOMATO POWDER, ONION POWDER, CHEDDAR CHEESE (MILK, SALT, CULTURES, ENZYMES), SUGAR, SPICES, COCONUT OIL, GARLIC POWDER, BUTTERMILK, CITRIC ACID, YEAST EXTRACT, MALIC ACID, CREAM, PAPRIKA EXTRACT (COLOR), RED 40 LAKE, SODIUM CASEINATE, LACTIC ACID, WHEAT STARCH.
ingredients_text_en: DRIED POTATOES, VEGETABLE OIL (CORN OIL, COTTONSEED OIL, SOYBEAN OIL, SUNFLOWER OIL), DEGERMINATED CORN FLOUR, CORNSTARCH, RICE FLOUR, MALTODEXTRIN, MONO - AND DIGLYCERIDES, 2% SALT, WHEY, DEXTROSE, NATURAL FLAVORS, MONOSODIUM GLUTAMATE, TOMATO POWDER, ONION POWDER, CHEDDAR CHEESE (MILK, SALT, CULTURES, ENZYMES), SUGAR, SPICES, COCONUT OIL, GARLIC POWDER, BUTTERMILK, CITRIC ACID, YEAST EXTRACT, MALIC ACID, CREAM, PAPRIKA EXTRACT (COLOR), RED 40 LAKE, SODIUM CASEINATE, LACTIC ACID, WHEAT STARCH.
ingredients_text_en_imported: Dried potatoes, vegetable oil (contains one or more of the following: corn oil, cottonseed oil, soybean oil and/or sunflower oil), degerminated yellow corn flour, cornstarch, rice flour, maltodextrin, mon - and diglycerides, contains 2% or less of salt, whey, dextrose, natural flavors, monosodium glutamate, tomato powder, onion powder, cheddar cheese (milk, salt, cultures, enzymes), sugar, spices, coconut oil, garlic powder, buttermilk, citric acid, yeast extract, malic acid, cream, paprika extract (color), red 40 lake, sodium caseinate, lactic acid, wheat starch.
ingredients_text_es: PAPAS DESHIDRATADAS, ACEITE VEGETAL (MAÍZ, SEMILLA DE ALGODÓN, SOYA, GIRASOL), HARINA DE MAÍZ SIN GERMEN, MAICENA, HARINA DE ARROZ, MALTODEXTRINA, MONO Y DIGLICÉRIDOS, SAL 2%, SUERO DE LECHE, DEXTROSA, SABORIZANTES NATURALES, GLUTAMATO MONOSÓDICO, TOMATE EN POLVO, CEBOLLA EN POLVO, QUESO CHEDDAR (LECHE, SALT, CULTIVOS LÁCTEOS, ENZIMAS), ZÚCAR, ESPECIAS, ACEITE DE COCO, AJO EN POLVO, SUERO DE MANTEQUILLA, ÁCIDO CÍTRICO, EXTRACTO DE LEVADURA, ÁCIDO MÁLICO, CREMA, EXTRACTO DE PAPRIKA (COLORANTE), ROJO 40 LACA, CASEINATO DE SODIO, ÁCIDO LÁCTICO, ALMIDÓN DE TRIGO.
